# dating.cell_centers { #tspaint.dating.cell_centers }

```python
tspaint.dating.cell_centers(edges)
```

Geometric centres of the cells defined by ``edges``.

The geometric mean ``sqrt(edges[:-1] * edges[1:])`` is the natural cell centre on the
log-time axis the grid lives on.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**edges**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[array_like](`array_like`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(n_cells + 1,)`` ascending cell-boundary times (:func:`log_time_grid`).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(n_cells,)`` geometric centre (generations) of each cell.
